# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

variables:
  CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"  # Default script name

build_job:
  stage: build
  image: ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}  # Using custom image if provided
  script:
    - if [ -f "$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        chmod +x "$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT";
        ./"$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT";
      else
        echo "No build script found. Please add a custom build script named '$CUSTOM_BUILD_SCRIPT'.";
        exit 1;
      fi
  only:
    - branches
  allow_failure: true  # Allow the job to fail to provide flexibility
